words.definition_vi: bằng chứng mạnh mẽ, thuyết phục; dữ liệu/sự kiện rõ ràng chứng minh điều gì
words.definition_en: clear and convincing proof or facts that support a claim
words.example_sentence: The researchers presented strong evidence that climate change is accelerating global warming significantly.

words.definition_vi: mối lo ngại lớn, vấn đề quan trọng cần chú ý; điều gây lo lắng chính
words.definition_en: a significant worry or important issue that needs attention
words.example_sentence: Environmental pollution remains a major concern for governments worldwide seeking sustainable solutions.

words.definition_vi: phát triển bền vững; tăng trưởng kinh tế vừa đáp ứng nhu cầu hiện tại vừa bảo vệ tài nguyên tương lai
words.definition_en: economic growth that meets present needs without harming future generations' resources
words.example_sentence: Many Asian countries are investing in renewable energy to achieve sustainable development goals.

words.definition_vi: cuộc cạnh tranh gay gắt, khốc liệt; sự tranh giành mạnh mẽ giữa các đối thủ
words.definition_en: intense and aggressive rivalry between competitors
words.example_sentence: The smartphone market faces fierce competition as companies constantly innovate to attract consumers.

words.definition_vi: vấn đề tới hạn, cấp bách; sự việc rất quan trọng và cần giải quyết ngay
words.definition_en: a serious and urgent problem that requires immediate attention
words.example_sentence: Water scarcity has become a critical issue in developing nations affecting millions of people.

words.definition_vi: tác động sâu sắc, ảnh hưởng lớn; sự thay đổi mạnh mẽ và có ý nghĩa
words.definition_en: a deep and significant effect or influence on something
words.example_sentence: The industrial revolution had a profound impact on society, transforming how people lived and worked.

words.definition_vi: sự chấp nhận rộng rãi; việc áp dụng/sử dụng phổ biến ở nhiều nơi
words.definition_en: broad acceptance and use of something across many places or groups
words.example_sentence: The widespread adoption of smartphones has revolutionized communication and business practices globally.

words.definition_vi: nguyên tắc cơ bản, nền tảng; quy tắc hoặc ý tưởng chính yếu nhất
words.definition_en: a basic rule or essential idea that forms the foundation of something
words.example_sentence: Democracy is built on the fundamental principle that all citizens have equal rights and voice.

words.definition_vi: thành tích đáng chú ý, nổi bật; kết quả ấn tượng đạt được
words.definition_en: a notable and impressive accomplishment or success
words.example_sentence: Landing humans on the moon was a remarkable achievement that demonstrated technological advancement.

words.definition_vi: rủi ro vốn có, nguy hiểm tự nhiên; mối nguy hiểm nằm sẵn trong bản chất của cái gì
words.definition_en: a danger or hazard that is naturally present or built-in
words.example_sentence: Medical procedures carry inherent risks that doctors must discuss with patients before treatment.

words.definition_vi: tình trạng thiếu hụt cấp bách, tức thời; sự khan hiếm nghiêm trọng
words.definition_en: a severe and immediate lack or scarcity of something needed
words.example_sentence: The pandemic created an acute shortage of medical supplies in hospitals worldwide.

words.definition_vi: tầm quan trọng chiến lược; giá trị then chốt trong kế hoạch dài hạn
words.definition_en: significant value or relevance in achieving long-term goals or plans
words.example_sentence: The location of the port has strategic importance for international trade and regional security.

words.definition_vi: vấn đề mãn tính, kéo dài; sự cố tồn tại lâu dài khó giải quyết
words.definition_en: a persistent and long-lasting difficulty that is hard to solve
words.example_sentence: Unemployment remains a chronic problem in many developing countries affecting economic stability.

words.definition_vi: giải pháp tối ưu, hoàn hảo nhất; cách giải quyết tốt nhất có thể
words.definition_en: the best possible answer or method to solve a problem
words.example_sentence: Engineers worked to find the optimal solution for reducing energy consumption in buildings.

words.definition_vi: lợi ích cụ thể, hữu hình; kết quả tích cực có thể nhận thấy rõ
words.definition_en: a real and concrete advantage that can be clearly observed or measured
words.example_sentence: The new training program provided tangible benefits by increasing employee productivity significantly.

words.definition_vi: tình huống bất ổn, dễ thay đổi; hoàn cảnh không ổn định và có thể xấu đi
words.definition_en: an unstable condition that can change suddenly and unpredictably
words.example_sentence: The political situation in the region remains volatile with ongoing tensions between neighboring countries.

words.definition_vi: phương pháp toàn diện, bao quát; cách tiếp cận xem xét tất cả các khía cạnh
words.definition_en: a thorough method that considers all aspects or elements of a problem
words.example_sentence: Addressing climate change requires a comprehensive approach involving government, business, and individuals.

words.definition_vi: sự khác biệt nhỏ, không đáng kể; chênh lệch rất ít
words.definition_en: a small or insignificant variation between two things
words.example_sentence: There was only a marginal difference in test scores between the two student groups.

words.definition_vi: yêu cầu nghiêm ngặt, khắt khe; tiêu chuẩn cao và bắt buộc phải tuân thủ
words.definition_en: a strict and demanding standard that must be met
words.example_sentence: International safety standards impose stringent requirements on pharmaceutical companies before product approval.

words.definition_vi: sự tăng trưởng chưa từng có, kỷ lục; sự phát triển vượt bất kỳ mức nào trước đây
words.definition_en: expansion or increase that has never happened before or exceeded all previous records
words.example_sentence: The tech industry experienced unprecedented growth during the digital transformation decade.

words.definition_vi: tiềm năng tiềm ẩn, chưa khai thác; khả năng tồn tại nhưng chưa được phát huy
words.definition_en: hidden or undeveloped capability that exists but has not yet been realized
words.example_sentence: Many developing nations possess latent potential for economic growth if they invest in education.

words.definition_vi: phát biểu mơ hồ, không rõ ràng; lời nói có thể hiểu theo nhiều cách khác nhau
words.definition_en: a declaration or claim that can be interpreted in multiple ways or is unclear
words.example_sentence: The politician's ambiguous statement left voters confused about his actual position on the issue.

questions.question_text: The government presented _______ that pollution levels have decreased significantly over the past five years.
questions.explanation: "Strong evidence" là collocation đúng để chỉ bằng chứng thuyết phục. "Weak evidence" sai về nghĩa (trái ngược). "Strong/weak argument" không phù hợp vì câu nói về dữ liệu cụ thể, không phải lập luận.

questions.question_text: Climate change is considered a _______ that requires immediate international cooperation.
questions.explanation: "Major concern" là collocation chuẩn. "Major problem" không sai nhưng không phải collocation tự nhiên. "Serious/critical concern" có thể dùng nhưng "major concern" là cụm phổ biến nhất trong bài thi.

questions.question_text: The company committed to _______ by reducing carbon emissions and investing in renewable energy.
questions.explanation: "Sustainable development" là cụm chuẩn trong ngữ cảnh môi trường và kinh tế. Các lựa chọn khác không phải collocation tiêu chuẩn trong bài thi.

questions.question_text: The smartphone market experiences _______ as companies constantly innovate and compete for market share.
questions.explanation: "Fierce competition" là collocation chính xác. "Fierce rivalry" cũng đúng nhưng "fierce competition" phổ biến hơn. "Strong/intense competition" không phải collocation tự nhiên.

questions.question_text: Water pollution has become a _______ in many developing countries, affecting public health.
questions.explanation: "Critical issue" là collocation chuẩn. "Critical problem" cũng đúng nhưng "issue" tự nhiên hơn. "Serious/urgent issue" không phải collocation tiêu chuẩn.

questions.question_text: The invention of the internet had a _______ on global communication and commerce.
questions.explanation: "Profound impact" là collocation chuẩn. "Profound effect" cũng đúng nhưng "impact" phổ biến hơn. "Deep/strong impact" không phải collocation tự nhiên.

questions.question_text: The _______ of electric vehicles in developed countries has reduced carbon emissions significantly.
questions.explanation: "Widespread adoption" là collocation chuẩn. "Widespread use" cũng đúng nhưng "adoption" chính xác hơn. "Broad/mass adoption" không phải collocation tiêu chuẩn.

questions.question_text: Freedom of speech is a _______ of democratic societies worldwide.
questions.explanation: "Fundamental principle" là collocation chuẩn. "Basic/core/essential principle" cũng có thể dùng nhưng "fundamental" là từ phổ biến nhất trong bài thi.

questions.question_text: The discovery of antibiotics was a _______ that revolutionized modern medicine.
questions.explanation: "Remarkable achievement" là collocation chuẩn. "Remarkable success" cũng đúng nhưng "achievement" chính xác hơn. "Outstanding/impressive achievement" không phải collocation tiêu chuẩn.

questions.question_text: All financial investments carry _______ that investors must carefully consider before committing funds.
questions.explanation: "Inherent risk" là collocation chuẩn trong ngữ cảnh tài chính. "Inherent danger" không phù hợp. "Intrinsic/built-in risk" cũng đúng nhưng "inherent" phổ biến hơn.

questions.question_text: The pandemic caused an _______ of medical supplies, forcing hospitals to ration resources.
questions.explanation: "Acute shortage" là collocation chuẩn. "Acute scarcity" cũng đúng nhưng "shortage" phổ biến hơn. "Severe/critical shortage" không phải collocation tiêu chuẩn.

questions.question_text: The Suez Canal has _______ for international trade, connecting Europe and Asia.
questions.explanation: "Strategic importance" là collocation chuẩn. "Strategic value" cũng đúng nhưng "importance" phổ biến hơn. "Crucial/vital importance" không phải collocation tiêu chuẩn.
